title: Swimline logic in Gantt Chart or Timeline widget

posts.author: AlessandraB (Alessandra )
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have a swimlane logic in the Gantt or timeline view. So that each project is like a line that shows from when to when the project goes and that the milestones are then displayed on the line. So that the milestones don’t appear one below the other like in the Gantt, but all in one line. I want to use this to better summarise the overview, because otherwise I can only see a maximum of two projects at the same time, but I would like to see just one line for each project and then the milestones on the line. That would make the visualization of a huge amount of Data so much better!!

posts.author: jack598henry (Jack Henry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
To implement swimlane logic in the Gantt or timeline view, you can configure each project to appear as a single horizontal line with its milestones displayed on that line. This way, you can better visualize multiple projects simultaneously without the clutter of stacked milestones.

This approach will help you manage and overview a large amount of data more efficiently.

Best regards,
Jack Henry
